title: Children and young people with SCLN: services for stammers
body: "This study investigates the outcomes for children referred to speech and language therapy services for stammering. It looks into:   the treatment children have received factors that influenced treatment   The Better Communication research programme was part of a review of services for children and young people with speech, language and communication needs (SLCN). "

taxons.title: Safeguarding and social care for children
